warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
3min easy Row
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Jump Squat
10 Wall Ball
gymnastics:
Wall Ball: In pairs
3 attempts. with approx 3 mins between
e.g.
Min 1 A goes, B refs
Min 2 A continues/Rest
Min 3 B goes, A refs
Min 4 B continues/Rest

hypertrophy.reasoning: Row and wall ball tax posterior chain and shoulders heavily; accessory work targets opposing musculature and neglected areas.

raw_text:
Warm-up | Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
3min easy Row
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Jump Squat
10 Wall Ball
Wall Ball | Hip crease below top of the knee
Ball above the bottom of the line for ladies, above the line for men
If you get no repped, keep going but don't count the rep | In pairs
3 attempts. with approx 3 mins between
e.g.
Min 1 A goes, B refs
Min 2 A continues/Rest
Min 3 B goes, A refs
Min 4 B continues/Rest
500m Row | Max Effort 500m Row
siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Gymnastics: Wall Ball: In pairs. Metcon: 500m Row. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, shoulders (rear/lateral).
